reviews.comment:
Excelente atención además aceptan todas la formas de pago. Podes pagar con mercado pago. El servicio de aire para inflar las ruedas es gratuito excelente

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and they accept all forms of payment. You can pay with Mercado Pago. The tire inflation service is free—excellent!
